---
title: "RWAA Organizational Chart"
format: html
---

```{=html}

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>RWAA SA Team Org Chart</title>
<style>
  body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; background: #fff; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 0; padding: 1.5rem; }

  :root {
    --lilly-red: #CC0000;
    --imm-light: #d0f0e6; --imm-header: #0F6E56;
    --cmh-light: #daeeff; --cmh-header: #185FA5;
    --neuro-light: #e8e6f9; --neuro-header: #534AB7;
    --onc-light: #fde8df; --onc-header: #993C1D;
    --cap-light: #fdf0d5; --cap-header: #854F0B;
  }

  .org-title { background: #2C3E50; color: white; text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 1rem; }

  .stats-bar { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .stat-pill { background: #f5f5f5; border: 0.5px solid #ddd; border-radius: 999px; padding: 4px 14px; font-size: 13px; color: #555; }
  .stat-pill strong { color: #1a1a1a; }

  .filter-section { margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .filter-row { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .filter-label { font-size: 12px; color: #555; min-width: 110px; font-weight: 500; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .filter-btn { font-size: 11px; padding: 3px 10px; border: 0.5px solid #bbb; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: #1a1a1a; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; }
  .filter-btn:hover { background: #f0f0f0; }
  .filter-btn.active     { background: #2C3E50; color: #fff; border-color: transparent; }
  .filter-btn.active-user{ background: #3b82f6; color: #fff; border-color: transparent; }
  .filter-btn.active-pro { background: #7c3aed; color: #fff; border-color: transparent; }

  .grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 10px; }

  .group-card { border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }
  .group-card.imm   { background: var(--imm-light); }
  .group-card.cmh   { background: var(--cmh-light); }
  .group-card.neuro { background: var(--neuro-light); }
  .group-card.onc   { background: var(--onc-light); }
  .group-card.cap   { background: var(--cap-light); }

  .group-header { padding: 7px 10px 4px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #fff; line-height: 1.3; }
  .group-card.imm   .group-header { background: var(--imm-header); }
  .group-card.cmh   .group-header { background: var(--cmh-header); }
  .group-card.neuro .group-header { background: var(--neuro-header); }
  .group-card.onc   .group-header { background: var(--onc-header); }
  .group-card.cap   .group-header { background: var(--cap-header); }

  .gps-tag { color: #ff6b6b; }

  .lead { padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #1a1a1a; border-bottom: 0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); }
  .lead.gps { color: var(--lilly-red); }

  .member-list { padding: 4px 10px 8px; }
  .member { font-size: 11.5px; padding: 2px 0; color: #444; line-height: 1.5; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .member.fte { color: #1a1a1a; font-weight: 500; }
  .member.parttime { font-style: italic; }
  .member.hidden { display: none !important; }

  .badge { font-size: 9px; padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; }
  .badge-user { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; }
  .badge-pro  { background: #ede9fe; color: #6d28d9; }

  .legend { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 1rem; font-size: 12px; color: #666; }
  .legend-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
  .legend-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="org-title">RWAA SA Team</div>

<div class="stats-bar">
  <div class="stat-pill"><strong>56</strong> analysts total</div>
  <div class="stat-pill"><strong>19</strong> FTEs</div>
  <div class="stat-pill"><strong>37</strong> contractors</div>
  <div class="stat-pill"><strong>45</strong> MS in Stat/Biostat</div>
  <div class="stat-pill"><strong>51</strong> certified SAS programmers</div>
  <div class="stat-pill"><strong>9</strong> certified IHD users</div>
  <div class="stat-pill"><strong>8</strong> Aetion users</div>
  <div class="stat-pill"><strong>52</strong> active R users</div>
</div>

<div class="filter-section">
  <div class="filter-row">
    <span class="filter-label">Employment:</span>
    <button class="filter-btn active" onclick="setEmp('all',this)">All</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setEmp('fte',this)">FTEs only</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setEmp('contractor',this)">Contractors only</button>
  </div>
  <div class="filter-row">
    <span class="filter-label">Databases:</span>
    <button class="filter-btn active" onclick="setExp('','',this)">All</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('optum','user',this)">Optum Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('optum','pro',this)">Optum Professionals</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('healthverity','user',this)">HealthVerity Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('healthverity','pro',this)">HealthVerity Professionals</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('flatiron','user',this)">Flatiron Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('flatiron','pro',this)">Flatiron Professionals</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('iqvia','user',this)">IQVIA Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('iqvia','pro',this)">IQVIA Professionals</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('trinetx','user',this)">TriNetX Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('trinetx','pro',this)">TriNetX Professionals</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('komodo','user',this)">Komodo Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('komodo','pro',this)">Komodo Professionals</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('truveta','user',this)">Truveta Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('truveta','pro',this)">Truveta Professionals</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('ibdplexus','user',this)">IBD Plexus Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('ibdplexus','pro',this)">IBD Plexus Professionals</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('meps','user',this)">MEPS Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('meps','pro',this)">MEPS Professionals</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('nhanes','user',this)">NHANES Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('nhanes','pro',this)">NHANES Professionals</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('cprd','user',this)">CPRD Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('cprd','pro',this)">CPRD Professionals</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('welldoc','user',this)">WellDoc Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('welldoc','pro',this)">WellDoc Professionals</button>
  </div>
  <div class="filter-row">
    <span class="filter-label">Tools:</span>
    <button class="filter-btn active" onclick="setExp('','',this)">All</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('ihd','user',this)">IHD Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('ihd','pro',this)">IHD Professionals</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('aetion','user',this)">Aetion Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('aetion','pro',this)">Aetion Professionals</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('sas','user',this)">SAS Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('sas','pro',this)">SAS Professionals</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('r','user',this)">R Users</button>
    <button class="filter-btn" onclick="setExp('r','pro',this)">R Professionals</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="grid">

  <!-- ROW 1: HEOR + Capabilities -->
  <div class="group-card imm">
    <div class="group-header">Immunology – HEOR</div>
    <div class="lead">Hanbo Qiu</div>
    <div class="member-list">
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="2" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="2" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Srilatha Yelamanchili</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Yun Fang</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="2" data-ibdplexus="2" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Guangyong Li</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="1">Zhuowei Wang</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="2" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Mohammed Rahman</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Chaoyi Zheng</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="group-card neuro">
    <div class="group-header">Neuroscience – HEOR</div>
    <div class="lead">Xueqing Huang</div>
    <div class="member-list">
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="2" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="2" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Yixun Wu</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Xinran (Flora) Luo</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Yunfei Wang</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="2" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Yiyun Ma</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Max Lyu</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="group-card cmh">
    <div class="group-header">CMH – HEOR &amp; <span class="gps-tag">GPS</span></div>
    <div class="lead">Tianshu Feng</div>
    <div class="member-list">
      <div class="member fte" data-optum="3" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="3" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Christi Kao</div>
      <div class="member fte" data-optum="3" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="2" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="1">Dongju Liu</div>
      <div class="member contractor" style="color:var(--lilly-red)" data-optum="3" data-healthverity="2" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="2" data-meps="2" data-nhanes="2" data-cprd="3" data-ihd="2" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Melody Dehghan</div>
      <div class="member fte" data-optum="3" data-healthverity="2" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="2" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="2" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Frank Cao</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="3" data-healthverity="2" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="2" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="2" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="2" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Pedram Azimzadeh</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="3" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="2" data-ihd="2" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Alice Li</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="2" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="2" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="3" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="1">Debbie Tinsley</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="3" data-healthverity="2" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="2" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="2" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Alexandra (Zan) Meeks</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="3" data-healthverity="2" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="2" data-iqvia="2" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="2" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="2" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Sean He</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Zheng Gu</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Xutong Li</div>
      <div class="member contractor parttime" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Lian Duan (part time)</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="group-card onc">
    <div class="group-header">Oncology – HEOR, HTA, <span class="gps-tag">GPS</span></div>
    <div class="lead gps">Yimei Han</div>
    <div class="member-list">
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="1">Baoyi Feng</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="3" data-iqvia="2" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Tomoko Sugihara</div>
      <div class="member fte" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Patrick Li</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="2" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="2" data-iqvia="2" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Frank Tian</div>
      <div class="member fte" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="2" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="2" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="2" data-r="3">Ziwei Zhang</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Yueyi Xue</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="1">Guangyu Xu</div>
      <div class="member fte" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="2" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Noah Seethaler</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Quan Yuan</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="group-card cap">
    <div class="group-header">Capability – All &amp; <span class="gps-tag">GPS</span></div>
    <div class="lead gps">Andy Dang</div>
    <div class="member-list">
      <div class="member fte" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="2" data-truveta="2" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="2" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="2" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Yifei Zhang</div>
      <div class="member fte" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="2" data-truveta="2" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Jake William Coldiron</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="3" data-iqvia="2" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="1">Dan He</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Max Lyu</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ROW 2: HTA -->
  <div class="group-card imm">
    <div class="group-header">Immunology – HTA</div>
    <div class="lead">Lili Huang</div>
    <div class="member-list">
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="1">Fei Xu</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="group-card neuro">
    <div class="group-header">Neuroscience – HTA &amp; <span class="gps-tag">GPS</span></div>
    <div class="lead gps">Carol Qiao</div>
    <div class="member-list">
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Ying Jing</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Peggy Lin</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Xuan Wei</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="group-card cmh">
    <div class="group-header">CMH – HTA</div>
    <div class="lead">Steve Zheng</div>
    <div class="member-list">
      <div class="member fte" data-optum="2" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="2" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Ying Fang</div>
      <div class="member fte" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Yeran Tong</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Junyuan Zheng</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Thomas Huang</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Bo Ma</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Elaine Lui</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Peng Du</div>
      <div class="member contractor parttime" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="2">Zbigniew Kadziola (part time)</div>
      <div class="member contractor" data-optum="1" data-healthverity="1" data-ibdplexus="1" data-komodo="1" data-truveta="1" data-flatiron="1" data-iqvia="1" data-trinetx="1" data-nhis="1" data-welldoc="1" data-meps="1" data-nhanes="1" data-cprd="1" data-ihd="1" data-aetion="1" data-sas="3" data-r="3">Xiaoliu Xu</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="grid-column: span 2;"></div>

</div>

<div class="legend">
  <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:#1D9E75;"></div> Immunology</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:#378ADD;"></div> CMH</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:#7F77DD;"></div> Neurology</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:#D85A30;"></div> Oncology</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:#BA7517;"></div> Capabilities</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:#1a1a1a;"></div> FTE</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:#888;border:1px solid #bbb;"></div> Contractor</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:#CC0000;"></div> GPS-aligned lead</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:#3b82f6;"></div> User (level 2)</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:#7c3aed;"></div> Professional (level 3)</div>
</div>

<script>
let empFilter = 'all';
let expKey = '';
let expLevel = '';

function setEmp(type, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-row:first-child .filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active','active-user','active-pro'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  empFilter = type;
  apply();
}

function setExp(key, level, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-row:not(:first-child) .filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active','active-user','active-pro'));
  if (!key) {
    btn.classList.add('active');
    expKey = ''; expLevel = '';
  } else {
    btn.classList.add(level === 'pro' ? 'active-pro' : 'active-user');
    expKey = key; expLevel = level;
  }
  apply();
}

function apply() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.member').forEach(m => {
    let show = true;
    if (empFilter === 'fte' && !m.classList.contains('fte')) show = false;
    if (empFilter === 'contractor' && !m.classList.contains('contractor')) show = false;
    if (expKey) {
      const val = parseInt(m.dataset[expKey] || '1');
      if (expLevel === 'user' && val < 2) show = false;
      if (expLevel === 'pro'  && val < 3) show = false;
    }
    m.classList.toggle('hidden', !show);

    // Badges
    m.querySelectorAll('.badge').forEach(b => b.remove());
    if (expKey && !m.classList.contains('hidden')) {
      const val = parseInt(m.dataset[expKey] || '1');
      if (val >= 2) {
        const b = document.createElement('span');
        b.className = 'badge ' + (val >= 3 ? 'badge-pro' : 'badge-user');
        b.textContent = val >= 3 ? 'Professional' : 'User';
        m.appendChild(b);
      }
    }
  });
}
</script>

</body>
</html>
 
```
